Order X Banner Stand Hardware for Trade Show Displays

Professional X banner stand hardware designed for trade shows, retail displays, and indoor presentations. This adjustable display system accommodates multiple banner sizes with durable construction for repeated use.

Key Features:

  • High-impact plastic support hub and banner hooks
  • Strong, flexible fiberglass arms keep banners taut
  • Adjustable arms accommodate multiple banner sizes
  • Lightweight 2lb construction for easy transport
  • Professional appearance for business displays

Display Specifications:

  • Product Size: 36" W x 78" H x 27.5" D when assembled
  • Compatible with various banner sizes
  • Indoor use recommended for optimal durability

Note: Banner sold separately. To avoid frame damage, do not use banners below recommended size specifications.

X Banner Stand Material & Construction Details

Our X banner stand hardware features premium materials selected for durability and professional presentation quality.

Construction Materials:

  • Flexible Fiberglass Arms: Strong yet flexible arms maintain banner tension without breaking

Material Benefits:

  • Lightweight design at only 2 pounds total weight
  • Durable construction withstands repeated assembly and disassembly
  • Professional appearance suitable for business environments
  • Adjustable system accommodates various banner dimensions

This material combination ensures your display hardware performs reliably for trade shows, retail presentations, and indoor advertising applications.

X Banner Stand Hardware Compatibility & Banner Requirements

Important specifications for banners used with your X banner stand hardware to ensure proper display and prevent equipment damage.

Compatible Banner Specifications:

  • Recommended banner materials: Vinyl, fabric, or mesh materials
  • Banner sizing must meet minimum requirements to prevent frame damage
  • Grommets or pole pockets required for proper attachment
  • Maximum display area: Accommodates standard trade show banner sizes

Banner Preparation Guidelines:

  • Attachment Points: Ensure banners include appropriate grommets or attachment hardware
  • Material Weight: Use appropriate banner weight for indoor display applications
  • Size Requirements: Verify banner dimensions meet hardware specifications before ordering

Setup Recommendations:

  • Test banner attachment before final display setup
  • Ensure banner material is suitable for repeated attachment and removal
  • Verify banner dimensions work within adjustable arm range

Important Notes:

  • Banners sold separately from hardware
  • Using undersized banners may damage the X banner stand frame
  • Contact customer service for banner compatibility questions

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About X Banner Stand Hardware

What banner sizes work with this X banner stand hardware?

The adjustable arms accommodate multiple banner sizes, with assembled dimensions of 36" W x 78" H x 27.5" D. Use banners within recommended size specifications to prevent frame damage. Contact customer service for specific size compatibility questions.

Is this X banner stand hardware suitable for outdoor use?

This hardware is designed primarily for indoor applications such as trade shows, retail displays, and business presentations. Indoor use helps ensure maximum durability and professional appearance.

How much does the X banner stand hardware weigh?

The complete hardware weighs only 2 pounds, making it highly portable for transport between trade shows, meetings, and display locations.

Are banners included with the X banner stand hardware?

No, banners are sold separately. This allows you to customize your display content while reusing the durable hardware for multiple presentations and events.

What materials is this X banner stand hardware made from?

The hardware features high-impact plastic support hubs and banner hooks, combined with strong, flexible fiberglass arms that maintain banner tension while resisting breakage.

How quickly can I receive X banner stand hardware?

Production times range from 2 to 5 business days, plus shipping time. Express 2-day production is available when you need display hardware quickly for upcoming events.

Can this hardware be used for multiple banner changes?

Yes, the durable construction and secure hook system allow for repeated banner changes, making it ideal for businesses that update their messaging for different events or promotions.

What shipping options are available for X banner stand hardware?

We offer standard, expedited, and overnight shipping options. All hardware ships from our Minnesota facility with tracking information provided for order monitoring.
